title: Darshan Hiranandani : How Can I View and Use Other Team Members' Gmail Accounts for Email Automation?

posts.author: noxolos697 (Darshan Hiranandani )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m Darshan Hiranandani, working on setting up an email automation and need to send emails from one of my team members’ Gmail accounts, but currently, I can only see my own Gmail account when I reach the email section. I need to connect my team member’s Gmail to the automation, but I can’t figure out how to do that.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Any suggestions or solutions on how I can view and connect my team member’s Gmail account to the automation?

Looking forward to your help, thank you!
Regards
Darshan Hiranandani
